name: Fuso Dentsu Co., Ltd.
summary: Fuso Dentsu Co., Ltd. engages in the information and communication technology (ICT) business in Japan. The company offers IT solutions in the areas of printing, network, communication, cloud, digital signage, and information security; operation/maintenance, application development, and telephone operation management support services; procurement of indirect materials; and facilities and ICT foundation construction services. It also provides business IT solutions for the healthcare, government agency municipality, education, energy saving, airport, corporate, sales, sales management, accounting, human resources, design and manufacture, rice wholesale, production control, logistics, distribution transportation, retail store facility, hotel, medical/welfare, consulting, big data, and region creation industries. The company operates a network of 54 branches. Fuso Dentsu Co., Ltd. was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
